new_claims.claim_text: Indian AI startup Objectways is paying local workers $2-3/hr to wear headcams and film their hand movements for AI training data, then selling this footage.
new_claims.notes: Report of potential labor exploitation in AI data collection. From recent browse notes.

new_claims.claim_text: Ruthless container loading at a Chinese port is overwhelming foreign workers.
new_claims.notes: Observation of harsh labor conditions and potential exploitation. From recent feed digest.

updated_claims.notes: Recent posts indicate the US Navy is blockading the Strait of Hormuz, targeting Iranian ships, not that the Strait is closed to US/Israel-linked vessels. The nature of the blockade is different from the original claim.
